figures.caption: Figure 1: Learning results for two representative environments, selected from Appendix E. The first column represents the evolution of −KLz(dπ,γ(z)||q∗(z)), and the second column the evolution of −Es0∼p0(·) [KLz(dπ,γ(z|s0)||q∗(z))], when learning exploration policies. The third column represents the evolution of the expected return when learning MaxEntRL control policies.

Figure 4: Expected return during the policy optimization. The expectation is computed empirically with Monte Carlo simulations. For each iteration, the interquartile mean over 6 runs is reported, along with its 95% confidence interval.
